findings.description: Potential exfiltration instructions detected in tool description.
findings.recommendation: Review tool descriptions for phrases that instruct the model to move data outside the intended scope.

findings.description: Package '@supabase/mcp-server-postgrest' looks suspiciously like trusted server 'mcp-server-postgresql' (character substitution/omission).
findings.recommendation: Verify you meant to install this package and not 'mcp-server-postgresql'.

findings.description: Server configuration has changed since the last scan.
findings.recommendation: Review the changes to ensure they are intentional and secure.
